ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "cbsa" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the CBSA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "days_with_aqi" INTEGER /* Total days with AQI recorded */,
  "good_days" INTEGER /* Number of good air quality days */,
  "moderate_days" INTEGER /* Number of moderate air quality days */,
  "unhealthy_sensitive_days" INTEGER /* Number of unhealthy for sensitive groups days */,
  "unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of unhealthy air quality days */,
  "very_unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of very unhealthy air quality days */,
  "hazardous_days" INTEGER /* Number of hazardous air quality days */,
  "max_aqi" INTEGER /* Maximum AQI recorded */,
  "percentile_90_aqi" INTEGER /* 90th percentile AQI value */,
  "median_aqi" INTEGER /* Median AQI value */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_data" (
  "pollution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality data record */,
  "days_co" INTEGER /* Number of days with CO pollution */,
  "days_no2" INTEGER /* Number of days with NO2 pollution */,
  "days_ozone" INTEGER /* Number of days with Ozone pollution */,
  "days_so2" INTEGER /* Number of days with SO2 pollution */,
  "days_pm2_5" INTEGER /* Number of days with PM2.5 pollution */,
  "days_pm10" INTEGER /* Number of days with PM10 pollution */,
  "concentration_co" REAL /* Concentration of CO */,
  "concentration_no2" REAL /* Concentration of NO2 */,
  "concentration_ozone" REAL /* Concentration of Ozone */,
  "concentration_so2" REAL /* Concentration of SO2 */,
  "concentration_pm2_5" REAL /* Concentration of PM2.5 */,
  "concentration_pm10" REAL /* Concentration of PM10 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_data_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "cbsa" TEXT /* Name of the Core Based Statistical Area */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the CBSA */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality data record */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., hazardous, unhealthy) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Feedback message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert related to the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "key" TEXT /* The API key string */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the API key was created */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
